hero.subtext: PixelForge gives professional photographers a seamless way to organize, share, and deliver photo collections to clients.
hero.ctaBannerPortfolio: Create your first gallery and deliver photos like a pro.
hero.ctaBannerFaq: Still have questions? Try it free — no commitment required.

portfolio.subtitle: Hover over photos to see the workflow in action.

features.title: Everything you need to deliver
features.subtitle: From the first shot to final delivery — PixelForge handles the workflow.
features.f1Desc: Organize every shoot into a clean collection. Track status from draft to delivery at a glance.
features.f2Desc: Let clients mark their favorites directly in the gallery. No more back-and-forth emails.
features.f3Desc: Deliver final edits in a polished branded experience your clients will actually enjoy.

plans.title: Simple, honest pricing
plans.subtitle: Start for free. Upgrade when your business grows.

why.title: Why PixelForge?
why.subtitle: Built specifically for photographers who value their time and client experience.
why.w1Desc: From upload to final delivery — everything in one place. No juggling separate tools, no chaos.
why.w2Desc: Clients select their favorites directly in the gallery. One click — no miscommunication.
why.w3Desc: Your client downloads all final photos in one click as a ZIP archive. Fast and hassle-free.
why.w4Desc: Works in the browser. No software to install, no extra steps — just log in and start working.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.
faq.a1: PixelForge is a photo delivery platform built for professional photographers. It lets you organize photo collections, share galleries with clients, receive their selections, and deliver final edited photos — all from one place.
faq.a2: You upload photos and share a gallery link with your client. They browse the gallery, mark their favorite photos, and submit their selection. You then receive the list and can start editing the chosen shots.
faq.a3: Yes. All photos are stored on Cloudflare R2, a secure and reliable cloud storage service. Galleries can be password-protected, and only people with the link can access them.
faq.q4: What's the difference between the plans?
faq.a4: The Free plan lets you try PixelForge with limited collections and photos. Professional adds more capacity, custom branding, and watermarks. Business unlocks unlimited collections, photo reordering, and priority support.
faq.a5: Yes, you can cancel anytime from your account settings. You'll keep access to your plan features until the end of the current billing period. No long-term contracts or hidden fees.
faq.q6: How do clients receive their photos?
faq.a6: Once you upload the final edited photos and mark the collection as delivered, your client receives a delivery link. They can preview and download all photos as a single ZIP archive with one click.

footer.tagline: Professional photo delivery for modern photographers.
footer.getStartedDesc: Start your free trial today. No credit card required.
